message.content: Building the new checkout UI this sprint. It calls the pricing API and renders the final total — I'm assuming the API returns prices with discounts already applied, so checkout just displays whatever it gets back.

Change of plan — turns out the pricing API only returns list price, not the discounted total. So I'm computing the discount preview client-side in checkout instead, reimplementing the discount rules in TypeScript so the shopper sees the deal before they pay.
Need checkout done by end of sprint for the customer demo.
